start: Welcome to the VPN bot. Please choose your language.
package_not_available: This package is no longer active. Please choose a package again.
enter_custom_gb: Please enter the custom amount in GB.
invalid_gb: Invalid amount. Allowed range: {min_gb} to {max_gb} GB.
payment_method_prompt:
Your order:
Traffic: {gb} GB
Price: {price} Toman

Choose payment method.
wallet_purchase_prompt:
Your order:
Traffic: {gb} GB
Price: {price} Toman
Wallet balance: {balance} Toman

Pay from your wallet to activate the service automatically.
wallet_required_payment: Direct order payment is disabled. Please charge your wallet first, then buy from wallet balance.
insufficient_wallet_balance: Your wallet balance is not enough. Please charge your wallet first.
wallet_purchase_failed: Wallet payment was refunded because service activation failed: {error}
crypto_not_configured: Crypto payment is not configured yet.
crypto_payment_instructions:
Litecoin payment
Traffic: {gb} GB
Price: {price} Toman
Required amount: {ltc} LTC
Rate: {rate} Toman per LTC

Send exactly this amount or more to:
{wallet}

After payment, send the Litecoin transaction hash here.
invalid_crypto_tx: Invalid transaction hash. Please send the 64-character Litecoin transaction hash.
crypto_tx_already_used: This transaction hash was already used for another order.
crypto_check_failed:
Could not verify payment: {error}
If the transfer is new, wait a minute and send the hash again.
crypto_order_created: Crypto payment verified and submitted for admin review. Order ID: {order_id}
enter_topup_amount: Enter the amount you want to add to your wallet in Toman.
invalid_topup_amount: Invalid amount. Please enter a positive Toman amount.
wallet_ltc_instructions:
Wallet charge with Litecoin
Quote ID: {quote_id}
Credit amount: {amount} Toman
Required amount: {ltc} LTC
Rate: {rate} Toman per LTC
This quote is valid for 30 minutes.

Send exactly this amount or more to:
{wallet}

After payment, send the Litecoin transaction hash here.
crypto_quote_invalid: This crypto quote is not active anymore. Please start a new wallet charge.
crypto_quote_expired: This crypto quote expired. Please start a new wallet charge to get a fresh rate.
wallet_receipt_created: Your wallet charge receipt was sent for admin review. Tracking ID: {tx_id}
wallet_ltc_topup_done:
Litecoin payment verified.
Wallet credited: {amount} Toman
New balance: {balance} Toman
wallet_topup_approved:
Your wallet charge was approved.
Credited: {amount} Toman
wallet_topup_rejected: Your wallet charge was rejected. Please contact support or send a correct receipt.
send_receipt: Please upload the payment receipt image.
receipt_required: Please send only a receipt image.
order_created: Your receipt was submitted for admin review. Order ID: {order_id}
order_rejected: Your order was rejected. Please contact support or upload a correct receipt.
new_receipt_requested: Admin requested a new receipt. Please upload the correct receipt again.
approval_failed: Service activation failed. Support will review it.
configs_not_available: Use the subscription link to import configs.
no_service: You do not have an active service yet.
no_orders: You have not placed any orders yet.
trial_not_joined: Please join the required channel first, then try again.
trial_channel_check_failed: I could not check channel membership. Please make sure the bot is added to the required channel, preferably as admin.
trial_already_used: You have already used your free trial.
trial_active_service_exists: You already have an active service, so the free trial is not needed.
help_text: Charge your wallet by card transfer or LTC, then buy or renew from your Toman wallet balance. Card top-ups need admin approval; verified LTC top-ups credit automatically.
support_prompt: Send your support message here. Admin replies will come back through this bot.
support_sent: Your message was sent to support. We will reply here.
support_reply_prompt: Send your reply. It will be delivered by the bot, without showing your Telegram account.
support_reply_failed: Could not send the reply. The user may have blocked the bot.
discount_invalid: This discount code is not valid or has expired.
discount_applied:
Discount applied.
Code: {code}
Discount: {discount} Toman
Final price: {price} Toman
referral_friend_bonus_applied: Referral bonus applied: +{bonus_gb}GB on this first purchase.
referral_pending_bonus_applied: Your pending referral bonus was also applied: +{bonus_gb}GB.
referral_reward_applied: Referral reward received: +{bonus_gb}GB was added to your active service.
referral_reward_pending: Referral reward received: +{bonus_gb}GB. It will be added automatically after you have an active service.
reason_reject_wrong_card: Payment was sent to the wrong card
wallet_tx_not_pending: This wallet transaction was already processed.
retry_only_failed: Retry is only available for failed orders.
no_active_service_for_completion: No active service found for this order's user.
order_marked_completed: Your order was marked completed by support.
enter_search_query: Enter Telegram ID, Telegram username, Marzban username, or order ID like: order 12.
delete_remote_missing: User was not found in Marzban; local database status was marked deleted.
enter_new_service_gb: Enter GB amount for the new service.
choose_broadcast_segment: Choose who should receive this broadcast.
confirm_broadcast:
Confirm sending this message to all users?

{text}
enter_package_price: Send the new total price for {gb}GB.
enter_package_definition:
Send package as: GB PRICE
Example: 20 3000000
cannot_remove_last_package: At least one package must remain active.
enter_discount_definition:
Send discount as: CODE PERCENT AMOUNT_TOMAN MAX_USES
Example: NEW10 10 0 100
Use 0 for percent or amount if needed. MAX_USES is optional.
send_qr_image: Send the LTC wallet QR image. Send - to remove it.
enter_wallet_adjust_user: Enter Telegram ID, username, or Marzban username for wallet adjustment.
enter_wallet_adjust_amount:
Current wallet balance: {balance} Toman
Enter adjustment amount in Toman. Use negative numbers to subtract.
enter_wallet_adjust_note: Send the reason/note for this wallet adjustment.
bulk_enter_name:
Send a name for this reseller batch.
Example: Reza Shop May 2026
bulk_invalid_name: Batch name is too short. Please send a clear name.
bulk_enter_plan:
Send the bulk plan, one line per package.
Examples:
2x5
5x10
10 1

The first number is quantity, the second number is GB.
bulk_invalid_plan:
Invalid bulk plan: {error}
Please send lines like 2x5 or 5 10.
bulk_creating: Creating {count} Marzban accounts. This may take a moment.
